title: Legendary Backpack
description: Adds an insanely large backpack for those who need legendary storage in their adventures!
body:
# 🏆 Legendary Backpack – The Ultimate Storage Solution!

**Legendary Backpack** is an addon for the **[RPG Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/rpg-backpacks)** mod, introducing a colossal backpack with **154 slots** of inventory space! Designed for adventurers, hoarders, and explorers who never want to run out of storage, this backpack is truly legendary.

---

## ⚠️ Requirements

Since this is an **addon**, it requires the following mods to function:  
✔ **[RPG Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/rpg-backpacks)** – The base mod that adds backpack functionality.  
✔ **[Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) (Optional but Recommended)** – Needed if you want to **wear** the Legendary Backpack instead of just carrying it in your inventory.

Without **RPG Backpacks**, this mod **will not work**, so make sure to install it first!

---

## 🛠️ Crafting the Legendary Backpack

Crafting this backpack requires high-tier materials, making it a true **endgame item** for those who seek infinite storage.

### **Crafting Recipe:**

![legendarybackpackrecipe](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/v1qrnt8bpc0lrmxx6k7ty/legendarybackpackrecipe.PNG?rlkey=durwlnkllp8xjx393y5qv0tmp&st=916cduxf&dl=1)

Place these in a crafting table to forge the **Legendary Backpack**, an unmatched storage companion!

---

## 📦 Features of the Legendary Backpack

✅ **154 inventory slots** – The largest backpack in the game!  
✅ **Supports Curios API** – Wear it for extra convenience.  
✅ **Works just like RPG Backpacks** – Right-click to open, store, and organize your items easily.  
✅ **Endgame storage solution** – Crafted using rare and valuable materials.  
✅ **Powerful** – While incredibly useful, the crafting recipe ensures it remains a late-game achievement.

---

## 📥 Installation

1️⃣ Download **[RPG Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/rpg-backpacks)** (required) and **[Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)** (optional).  
2️⃣ Install this addon.  
3️⃣ Enjoy unlimited storage with the **Legendary Backpack**!

---

## 🏷️ FAQ

### ❓ **What is the difference between RPG Backpacks and Legendary Backpack?**

- **RPG Backpacks** adds various backpacks with increasing storage capacities.  
- **Legendary Backpack** is an **addon** that introduces a **single** ultra-large backpack for **endgame storage**.

### ❓ **Do I need RPG Backpacks for this to work?**

- Yes! This mod **requires** **[RPG Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/rpg-backpacks)** to function.

### ❓ **Can I wear the Legendary Backpack?**

- Yes, but only if you have **[Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)** installed. Otherwise, it works as a right-clickable storage item.

### ❓ **Where can I report issues or get support?**

- You can report issues in our **[Discord Community](https://discord.gg/RNG8Q5dFE3)**.

---

## 🔗 Related Links

🔹 **[RPG Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/rpg-backpacks)** – The base mod required for Legendary Backpack.  
🔹 **[RPG Backpacks Wiki](https://www.anchorstudios.site/wiki/rpg-backpacks)** – Learn more about the base mod’s backpacks.  
🔹 **[Discord Community](https://discord.gg/RNG8Q5dFE3)** – Join our community for support and updates.

Conquer the world with the **largest backpack ever made!** 🎒🔥
